classification.task_goal: Create a settings page and a saved page in Flutter with specific ListTile requirements.
primary_constraints: Settings page must utilize at least four ListTile widgets.
One ListTile must link to terms of service.
One ListTile must link to privacy policy.
Saved page must display saved content in vertically scrollable ListTile widgets.
classification.reasoning: The AI initially provided a settings page with duplicate ListTile entries and a saved page that was not vertically scrollable. The user pointed out these issues, and the AI corrected them in subsequent responses, thus enforcing the constraints after the violations.
